title: 3 simultaneous edge cases: symbol renamed + symbol deleted + new symbol with no test
commit_message: refactor!: rename CARD_NUMBER_REGEX → FULL_CARD_REGEX, remove advertisement fn, add getStreamingQuality

edge_case_1_RENAMED_SYMBOL.description: CARD_NUMBER_REGEX was renamed to FULL_CARD_REGEX and its pattern now also accepts 16-digit cards.
edge_case_1_RENAMED_SYMBOL.selection_effect: Tests are still selected (describe label = 'CARD_NUMBER_REGEX' exists in the repo) — but ALL will FAIL because the old name no longer exists in source.
edge_case_1_RENAMED_SYMBOL.system_must_detect: Symbol CARD_NUMBER_REGEX removed from diff. Symbol FULL_CARD_REGEX added. No describe('FULL_CARD_REGEX') exists in test repository → GAP.
tests_selected_and_will_fail: CARD_NUMBER_REGEX > accepts a properly spaced 19-character card number
CARD_NUMBER_REGEX > rejects a card number shorter than 17 characters
CARD_NUMBER_REGEX validates checkout flow input > accepts a standard 19-character card number with spaces
CARD_NUMBER_REGEX validates checkout flow input > rejects a card number shorter than 17 characters
CARD_NUMBER_REGEX validates checkout flow input > rejects a card number that contains letters

edge_case_2_DELETED_SYMBOL.description: advertisement() function entirely removed from ApiEndPoints.js.
edge_case_2_DELETED_SYMBOL.selection_effect: The test 'advertisement endpoint builder produces a correctly interpolated URL' is selected as CRITICAL and will FAIL at runtime because the function no longer exists in source.
edge_case_2_DELETED_SYMBOL.system_must_detect: Symbol 'advertisement' removed from diff (lines with -). Existing test selected → must emit BREAKAGE WARNING, not just CRITICAL.
edge_case_2_DELETED_SYMBOL.test_selected_and_will_fail: endpoints.favourites > advertisement endpoint builder produces a correctly interpolated URL

edge_case_3_NEW_SYMBOL_NO_TEST.description: getStreamingQuality() is a brand-new export in utilities.js. No describe block in the test repository mentions it.
edge_case_3_NEW_SYMBOL_NO_TEST.selection_effect: No test is selected. System must emit a COVERAGE GAP.
edge_case_3_NEW_SYMBOL_NO_TEST.system_must_detect: Symbol 'getStreamingQuality' added (diff lines with +). Scan test-manifest.json — symbol not in any symbols[]. → REPORT GAP, no test run.

CRITICAL.reason: describe() label or symbols[] matches old symbol name (before rename/delete). Tests will be selected but may fail at runtime.

tests.test: CARD_NUMBER_REGEX > accepts a properly spaced 19-character card number
tests.result: ⚠️  WILL FAIL — CARD_NUMBER_REGEX no longer exported; FULL_CARD_REGEX is the new name

tests.test: CARD_NUMBER_REGEX > rejects a card number shorter than 17 characters
CARD_NUMBER_REGEX validates checkout flow input > accepts a standard 19-character card number with spaces
tests.result: ⚠️  WILL FAIL — CARD_NUMBER_REGEX inlined in test but mismatch in intent

tests.test: CARD_NUMBER_REGEX validates checkout flow input > rejects a card number shorter than 17 characters
tests.result: ⚠️  WILL FAIL — old name no longer valid contract with source

tests.test: CARD_NUMBER_REGEX validates checkout flow input > rejects a card number that contains letters
endpoints.favourites > advertisement endpoint builder produces a correctly interpolated URL
tests.result: ⚠️  WILL FAIL — advertisement() deleted from source; test inlines the function so it still runs, but the source contract is broken

HIGH.reason: Sibling symbols in the same changed source files — not directly changed but defensively included

tests.test: EMAIL_REGEX > accepts a valid .com email address
tests.why: constants.ts changed (CARD_NUMBER_REGEX renamed) — all constants in same file are HIGH

tests.test: EMAIL_REGEX > rejects an email address missing the @ symbol
EMAIL_REGEX > rejects a non-.com domain (e.g. .org)
PASSWORD_REGEX_CHANGE_PASSWORD > accepts a password meeting all requirements
PASSWORD_REGEX_CHANGE_PASSWORD > rejects a password without an uppercase letter
PASSWORD_REGEX_CHANGE_PASSWORD > rejects a password without a special character
PASSWORD_REGEX_CHANGE_PASSWORD > rejects a password longer than 30 characters
CARD_REGEX > accepts a string of digits and spaces
CARD_REGEX > rejects letters inside a card number
PHONE_REGEX > accepts a 10-digit phone number
PHONE_REGEX > accepts a phone number with a + country prefix
PHONE_REGEX > rejects a phone number shorter than 10 digits
UNIQUE_USERNAME_REGEX > accepts a valid alphanumeric username with a letter
UNIQUE_USERNAME_REGEX > rejects a username made entirely of digits
validateEmailOrUsername uses EMAIL_REGEX > routes input containing @ to email validation and accepts a valid address
validateEmailOrUsername uses EMAIL_REGEX > routes plain text input to username validation and accepts a clean username
validateEmailOrUsername uses EMAIL_REGEX > returns an error message when the email format is invalid via EMAIL_REGEX
validateEmailOrUsername uses EMAIL_REGEX > returns an error message when the username contains special characters
generateCardNumber output satisfies CARD_REGEX > output of generateCardNumber preserves first and last 4 digits
tests.why: sources include constants.ts AND utilities.js (both changed files)
tests.priority_boost: HIGH → near-CRITICAL because BOTH changed files appear in sources[]

tests.test: generateCardNumber output satisfies CARD_REGEX > correctly masks middle digits with X characters
storageKeys align with payment flow expectations > storageKeys.stripePaymentDetails equals STRIPEPAYMENTDETAILS
checkNull > returns an empty string when the value is null
tests.why: sources=[utilities.js] — new function added to same file

tests.test: checkNull > returns the original value when it is defined and non-null
checkArray > returns an empty array when the input is null
checkArray > returns the original array when it contains items
checkWhiteSpace > returns true for a string that contains a space
checkWhiteSpace > returns false for a string with no whitespace
getTimes > correctly parses 3661 seconds into 1h 01m 01s
getTimes > returns 0 hours when the duration is under 3600 seconds
getProgressWidth > calculates 50% when value is half of max
getProgressWidth > returns 0 when the value argument is missing or falsy
endpoints.payment > addCard points to the correct payment creation path
tests.why: ApiEndPoints.js changed (advertisement deleted) — sibling endpoints in same file

tests.test: endpoints.payment > getAllCards points to the cards listing path
endpoints.payment > paymentsCheckout points to the checkout path
endpoints.favourites > addCardtoFavourite endpoint points to sports favourites add path

SKIP.reason: Zero source overlap with any changed file

tests_for_old_name: CARD_NUMBER_REGEX > accepts a properly spaced 19-character card number
CARD_NUMBER_REGEX > rejects a card number shorter than 17 characters
CARD_NUMBER_REGEX validates checkout flow input > (3 tests)
action_required: Rename describe('CARD_NUMBER_REGEX') → describe('FULL_CARD_REGEX') in both test files
Add new test: 'accepts a 16-character card number' (pattern now allows 16-char)
Update test-manifest.json: replace CARD_NUMBER_REGEX → FULL_CARD_REGEX in symbols[] and describe fields

coverage_gaps.orphaned_test: endpoints.favourites > advertisement endpoint builder produces a correctly interpolated URL
action_required: Delete the test — the functionality no longer exists in source
OR if advertisement was moved to a different file, update @source tag and re-link

recommended_tests: returns 'unknown' for a null or zero bitrate
returns 'medium' for bitrate between 500 Kbps and 2 Mbps
returns 'unknown' for a negative bitrate value

system_behaviour_guide.how_to_handle_RENAME: When diff shows a line with '-export const FOO' AND '+export const BAR': (1) select all tests where symbols[] contains 'FOO' as CRITICAL, (2) search test-manifest for 'BAR' → not found → emit GAP-01
system_behaviour_guide.how_to_handle_DELETE: When diff shows only '-export ...' with no matching '+' for the same symbol: (1) select tests as CRITICAL + emit BREAKAGE_WARNING. Tests will fail. Developer must delete them.
system_behaviour_guide.how_to_handle_NEW: When diff shows only '+export ...' with no matching '-': (1) search test-manifest for new symbol name → not found → emit COVERAGE_GAP. No test is run. No CRITICAL.
system_behaviour_guide.priority_note: GAP-03 (new symbol, no test) is silent in the CRITICAL/HIGH lists — it produces only a gap report. This is a key distinction from RENAME and DELETE where old tests still exist and get selected.

jest_run_command: npx jest --config test_repository/jest.config.js --no-coverage -t "CARD_NUMBER_REGEX|endpoints.favourites|endpoints.payment|EMAIL_REGEX|PASSWORD_REGEX_CHANGE_PASSWORD|CARD_REGEX|PHONE_REGEX|UNIQUE_USERNAME_REGEX|validateEmailOrUsername uses EMAIL_REGEX|generateCardNumber output satisfies CARD_REGEX|storageKeys align with payment flow|checkNull|checkArray|checkWhiteSpace|getTimes|getProgressWidth"
